steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is “The historian's books about Zachary Taylor.” The head noun is plural: “books.” The possessive and prepositional phrases do not change that number.

steps.title: Match the plural verb
steps.content: B, C, and D are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject. The sentence needs the plural present-tense verb. The answer is A.
